_source: House identity — motto, DNA paragraphs, logo / symbol / uniform refs. Edit during bootcamp once the team picks them.

data.motto: House motto goes here — replace with the line your team picks.
data.dna_paragraph_1: House Pangpuriye in one paragraph — who joined, what brought them together, what kind of AI engineers they're training to become through Super AI Engineer Season 6 with AIAT.
data.dna_paragraph_2: How the house works day to day — weekly hackathons, blended online + onsite learning, peer review, real industry challenges from partner organisations.
data.uniform_desc: Describe what the house wears for hackathons, demos, graduation.
